name: Death by Chocolate Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Put the pie crust in a 9 or 10-inch springform pan; pressing it on the bottom and up the sides. Prick generously with a fork.
3. In a large bowl, combine the filling ingredients. Beat for about 50 strokes by hand.
4. Pour into crust-lined pan and bake for 50 to 55 minutes, or until the center is set and the edges of the crust are golden brown.
5. Cool for 1 hour. Remove the sides of the pan. Cool completely.
6. In a large bowl, beat the topping ingredients until stiff peaks form. Spoon or pipe topping over filling.
7. Garnish with chocolate curls. Store in the refrigerator.
